case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. RENEE SAUCEDA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT (RENTAL AGREEMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, RENEE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED OCT-05-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, RENEE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, RENEE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, RENEE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, RENEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MISSION STREET, #510, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
